email.description: Email address. Format: name@domain.com — no spaces, must include the @ and the dot.

phone.description: Phone number. International format preferred. Example: +44 7700 900000

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this page. Each card has an image + label + short blurb + link. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely. Example use: on the About page, point to the Reset Room and Reset Letters.

discovery_headline.description: Big heading above the 15-minute 1 to 1 chat flow. Example: 'Book a 15-minute 1 to 1 chat'. Leave blank to hide the whole 1 to 1 chat section.

discovery_intro.description: One-line promise shown above the button. Example: 'Booking costs £10, refunded straight after we speak.'

discovery_price_gbp.description: Price in GBP (whole pounds only). Change this and the Stripe charge changes automatically.

discovery_stripe_product_name.description: Product name shown on the Stripe checkout page. Keep short.

discovery_stripe_description.description: Product description shown on the Stripe checkout page — the refund promise reads here. Example: 'This £10 is refunded straight after your 1 to 1 chat. No forms, no chasing.'

discovery_calendly_url.description: REQUIRED. The Calendly booking URL customers land on after paying. Format: https://calendly.com/your-handle/discovery-call. If this is blank the button won't appear on the site.

discovery_why_price_label.description: Text of the expandable link under the button. Leave blank to hide the accordion entirely.

discovery_why_price_body.description: Content that shows when someone taps 'Why £10?'. Explain the refund + why the barrier exists. Never leaves the page — pure expander.
